reviews.name: David H
reviews.text: I've had the pleasure of having Dr. Aletaha and Dr. Houshmand as my dentists at Spring Valley Dental for over 10 years! They are both outstanding people and very skilled, with a fantastic support staff. I highly recommend anyone looking for a new dentist call Spring Valley Dental Associates.

reviews.name: Matio T
reviews.text: I've been coming to Spring Valley Dental for six years now, and it's been nothing but a great experience. They're always punctual, very thorough, and make every visit smooth and comfortable. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: Barbara W
reviews.text: They listen to your concerns and follow through with a suggested plan. The price schedule is fair and they will set up payment plans as needed. Tooth bonding work is excellent. Crown work is precise. They do Invisalign plans too.

reviews.name: Mike T
reviews.text: Love this place. The doctors are always willing to take care of anything you need. I cannot thank the doctors and staff enough for helping me with my dental issues.

reviews.name: Tyffanie R
reviews.text: I've avoided dentists for years due to fear. This is the first office I've found offering in-house financial plans, which helps tremendously since I don't have insurance. The numbing was almost completely painless. The whole team is amazing: laughing gas, a stress ball, music, a blanket, and a massage pad. I've recommended them to several people already.

reviews.name: Andrew T
reviews.text: From the moment I walked in, the staff was incredibly friendly and welcoming. Dr. Houshmand took the time to thoroughly explain everything and made sure I was completely at ease. It's rare to find a dental office where both the quality of care and the customer service are top-notch, but this place truly excels.

reviews.name: Dawn
reviews.text: Dr. Aletaha and Dr. Houshmand have changed the way I feel about going to the dentist. I used to absolutely dread it, but now I actually look forward to going! My family has had everything from cleanings to dental implants. Their attention to detail is amazing, and I can't thank them enough for making me feel so confident about my smile.

reviews.name: Kerry R
reviews.text: I've been with Dr. Aletaha for over 15 years. What drove me to her was her honesty, but I got so much more: a caring and gentle dentist. Now I have the privilege of working with her daughter, Dr. Houshmand, who is just as gentle, caring, and honest.

reviews.name: Stacy V
reviews.text: Been coming with my two boys for 8 years. They are so nice and I'm always happy when I leave, and that says a lot. They've truly changed my view about routine check-ups! Dr. Houshmand is wonderful, and my kids enjoyed their visit.

reviews.name: Levent K
reviews.text: I usually have a hard time trusting people and businesses, but Dr. Aletaha and Dr. Houshmand are very good at what they do. I came here for a dental emergency about 6 years ago, and since then my whole family visits for all their dental needs. I refer Spring Valley to everyone.

reviews.name: Deborah W
reviews.text: Dr. Aletaha and her friendly professional staff have provided my dental care for over 5 years. Her warm, caring and patient demeanor takes the worry and anxiety out of going to the dentist. They allow time to answer all your questions. This is an easy five star review.

reviews.name: Sharon E
reviews.text: Dr. Houshmand performed my wisdom tooth removal, two cavities filled, and a cleaning all on the same day! I was in great hands, and they were very attentive to keeping me comfortable during the whole process. We love this office!

reviews.name: Gerardo D
reviews.text: Beautiful practice, the staff is very friendly and the customer service was great. Dr. Aletaha is extremely knowledgeable and you can tell she cares about every patient she sees. This will be my go-to dental office from now on.

reviews.name: Michelle M
reviews.text: Dr. Nicole Houshmand is the best dentist. From her extraordinary care, to the time she spends with her patients, to her detailed work, all speak volumes. I absolutely recommend her and her dental office with great confidence.

reviews.name: Hope O
reviews.text: I've been going to Spring Valley Dental Associates for over 10 years and I've always received impeccable service from the doctors and extreme professionalism from the staff. I have recommended family and friends and will continue to, as they are the best.

reviews.name: Ana B
reviews.text: Dr. Houshmand and Dr. Aletaha are incredible dentists. I've always been scared of going to the dentist, but not anymore. They are kind and also gentle.

reviews.name: Yasi K
reviews.text: Nothing but kind words for this office. I used to have anxiety with anything dental, but everyone here has eased it. Clean office, kind staff, and amazing dentists. Always a great experience!

reviews.name: Tim
reviews.text: Dr. H and Greta were amazing, and very helpful in calming my nerves because I was anxious just for a filling! They offered me ways to get through the appointment. Very professional, and I did not feel judged for my teeth!

reviews.name: Kevin M
reviews.text: Initial visit with Dr. H and I was very pleased with the entire experience. The staff was professional and helped put me at ease, and Dr. H was thorough and very knowledgeable. I recommend this office to anyone looking for dental services.

reviews.name: LaTonja M
reviews.text: Dr. Aletaha and Dr. Houshmand are very nice and caring people who care about your teeth as well as your overall health. Been going there for over 5 years. Thanks Dr. Houshmand for the great job cleaning my teeth.

reviews.name: Jasmine R
reviews.text: I appreciate that they always give me my estimate after insurance so I can come in prepared and not be blindsided. And when I come in for my appointment, there is no additional wait time.

reviews.name: Patty B
reviews.text: I have been going to this dentist for over 30 years. They take such good care of me and there are a lot of special perks. It's like going home.

reviews.name: Pamela P
reviews.text: I have been coming to Spring Valley Dental for 16 years and I am so happy with their services! They are patient, friendly, knowledgeable, supportive and professional. I could not imagine a more pleasant experience anywhere else.
